stemHtml: How might you go about cross-checking your aircraft's position using the Airborne Weather Radar (AWR)?

options.a: By looking for a suitable point on the VFR map and comparing it with the dead reckoning position, using the heading and distance on the radar screen.
options.b: By using the mapping mode to obtain a magnetic bearing from the aircraft to suitable echoes on the display.
options.c: By selecting a suitable echo from the display, obtaining the relative bearing and distance, and converting it into a true bearing to plot on the chart.
options.d: By selecting a suitable point such as a large built-up area to obtain a fix.
